title: +combat -- cinematic encounter with autofire, cover, specified headshot, and grenade
description: A high-intensity, multi-round combat showcase. Jax is ambushed in a dark alley. He takes substantial cover, active-dodges a melee attack, fires an SMG short burst, lands a precise headshot that stuns a goon, and ends the encounter with a tactical fragment grenade.

steps.sub: Equip Jax with Weapons and Ammo

steps.note: Jax prepares for the alley ambush with a large SMG (MP-5), spare magazine, and a fragmentation grenade.

steps.sub: Equip Marcus with Weapons and Ammo

steps.note: Marcus prepares to ambush Jax with a light pistol.
Marcus attempts to ambush Jax in the rain-slicked alleyway before initiative is formally rolled.

steps.label: ST spikes Goon's threat toward Jax

steps.note: To protect himself from Marcus's incoming fire, Jax reflexively dives behind a metal dumpster, declaring substantial cover.
Since it is Marcus's turn (Initiative 11), Marcus fires at Jax. The substantial cover imposes a -2 modifier to Marcus's pool.
ST advances the turn to the Goon. Since the Goon is an NPC, they automatically execute their attack against Jax on their turn.

steps.sub: Round 1 -- Jax Retaliates with an SMG Short Burst

steps.note: Now it is Jax's turn (Initiative 2). With Marcus exposed, Jax leans out from cover (-2 concealment) and fires a short burst (+1 pool, consumes 3 rounds) using a Willpower spend (+3 pool) for maximum precision.
ST advances the turn to Round 2. It is Marcus's turn (Initiative 11) again. Marcus continues shooting at Jax.
ST advances the turn to the Goon (Initiative 4). The Goon automatically attacks Jax.

steps.sub: Round 2 -- Jax Delivers a Specified Headshot

steps.note: Now it is Jax's turn (Initiative 2). With the Goon right on top of him, Jax executes a specified unarmed blow to the Goon's head (-3 penalty) and spends Willpower (+3). Dealing 4+ damage triggers the Stunned Tilt.

steps.sub: Round 3 -- ST advances the turn to Marcus

steps.note: ST advances the turn to Round 3. It is Marcus's turn (Initiative 11).

steps.sub: Round 3 -- ST advances from Stunned Goon

steps.note: ST advances the turn. Goon is stunned, so their action is automatically resolved without acting.

steps.sub: Round 3 -- Ending it with a Fragment Grenade

steps.note: Both Marcus and the Goon are close together in the alley. Jax pulls the pin on a standard fragmentation grenade and tosses it at their feet, diving for safety.
The encounter draws to a close with both opponents injured and knocked down.
